title: Homoium
description: Yet another optimization mod for Minecraft 1.12.2
body:
## Homoium

**Homoium** aims to optimize vanilla places that other mods didn't touched.

### Optimizations

- Entity AI
- Minecart collision
- Math calculations
- Lag compensate features
- Hibernate server

### Bugfixes

Homoium also fixes Randar exploit, which may cause coordinate leaks

### Dependency

This mod requires **MixinBooter** and **ConfigAnyTime**!
